headline: Halozyme Announces Global Collaboration and License Agreement with Vertex Pharmaceuticals for Hypercon™ Technology
summary: Halozyme Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: HALO) ("Halozyme" or the "Company") today announced its wholly-owned subsidiary, Halozyme Hypercon, Inc., entered into a global exclusive collaboration and license agreement with Vertex Pharmaceuticals Incorporated ("Vertex"). Under the collaboration, Vertex has licensed Halozyme's Hypercon™ technology for use in up to three drug targets. Hypercon™ is an innovative microparticle technology that allows for hyperconcentration of drugs and biologics, thus reduci

headline: Is This Biotech Stock Your Best Shot at Building a Millionaire-Making Position?
summary: With an approved treatment in commercial stages and new drug candidates generating clinical trial results, this biotech has attracted a big Investor.
